description:
Remove the blanket #![allow(dead_code)] at line 22 of ir_codegen.rs.

After fz-cg1.1 removes _kp (the last known dead item), this suppress masks
nothing and hides any future dead code that accretes in the file.

Remove the attribute. Run `cargo build` (warnings are errors per CLAUDE.md).
For any item that now warns, either:
  a) Delete it if it is genuinely dead, or
  b) Add a targeted #[allow(dead_code)] with a comment explaining why it must
     stay (e.g., public API used by tests or external callers not visible to
     the compiler).

Do not add a blanket allow back under any circumstances.

## LANDING THE WORK
  Land this ticket before starting the next one:
  - Commit only the changes for this ticket, referencing fz-cg1.2
  - Close the ticket (`bw close fz-v9l.2`); It will tell you if work is newly unblocked
title: fz-cg1.2 remove blanket #![allow(dead_code)] module suppress
